race.comment: Tricky contest with plenty of chances. KITSUNE VIXEN (6) resumes after a lengthy break. Started hard in the market on debut with a disappointing last over 1000m at Tamworth last June. Looked to have plenty up her sleeve in both her trials and will prove hard to stop. MILLE FEUILLE (10) All Too Hard two-year-old filly from Magic Sound on debut for the Richard & Will Freedman yard. Never fully tested in both trials and look for her launching late. LADY CATALINA (8) Written Tycoon filly from Group-winning mare Away Game on debut for the Maher yard. Showed enough in her only trial, placing second over 800m at Hawkesbury. Tongue-tie goes on and can overcome the sticky gate. DIRTY DANI (5) Merchant Navy filly from a Camelot mare on debut for the Allan Kehoe yard. Well drawn and impressed in her two latest trials. Respect. The chances don't end there.
